blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
